verdict: A highly energetic and rhythmic chart with great syncopation, let down slightly by a highly unbalanced hold-active sequence and a repetitive eighth-note stream.

issues.problem: Holding the L panel while forcing the right foot to execute a rapid R -> D -> U eighth-note sequence creates awkward hold entrapment and highly unbalanced physical strain.
Looping the exact same R -> L -> D -> U stream pattern four times consecutively feels repetitive and uninspired.
